title: helicia lauterbachiana
intro: Helicia lauterbachiana, also known as the Papua New Guinea helicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is native to New Guinea and has been traditionally used by local communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Helicia lauterbachiana include teas and infusions, as well as topical applications, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
